mapper.sql: ua.id, ua.external_id, ua.username, ua.password, ua.display_name, ua.email, ua.phone, ua.avatar, ua.role_id, ua.status, ua.api_key, ua.must_change_password, ua.last_login_at, ua.created_at, ua.updated_at, sr.code as role
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_account ua LEFT JOIN sys_role sr ON ua.role_id = sr.id ORDER BY ua.created_at ASC
SELECT FROM user_account ua LEFT JOIN sys_role sr ON ua.role_id = sr.id WHERE ua.username = #{username}
SELECT FROM user_account ua LEFT JOIN sys_role sr ON ua.role_id = sr.id WHERE ua.api_key = #{apiKey}
SELECT id FROM sys_role WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account (username, password, display_name, email, phone, avatar, role_id, api_key, must_change_password, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{displayName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, (SELECT id FROM sys_role WHERE code = #{role}), #{apiKey}, #{mustChangePassword, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{status, jdbcType=TINYINT})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_account SET role_id = (SELECT id FROM sys_role WHERE code = #{role}), updated_at = NOW() WHERE username = #{username}
UPDATE user_account SET api_key = #{apiKey}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE username = #{username}
UPDATE user_account SET password = #{password}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE username = #{username}
